description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Fuuton)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 40

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 8

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, E

This technique takes the base form of a Rasengan and infuses it with potent wind Chakra, creating a spiraling sphere emitting a high-pitched scream, circled by a white blade of wind. The technique functions as Rasengan, but its empowerment is altered and it does not include a knockback.

If not used before the duration expires, the Rasenshuriken fades into nothingness.

Creatures who fail their save are knocked back 2d6 x 5 feet and are trapped in a vortex of microscropic needles of wind. While trapped, the target is unable to act, and suffers 3d6 wind damage as well as 1d6 permanent Chakra coil damage each round. Creatures within a 10ft Burst radius of the target also suffer 2d6 wind damage each round until they move out of the vortex.

If the attack hits, you suffer 4d6 temporary Chakra Coil damage (Fortitude DC 25 halves) and 1d10 Strength damage (Fortitude DC 20 halves). If at least half the technique's cost was paid with senjutsu Chakra (see the Sage's Handbook supplement), these drawbacks are negated.

Empower: Spend 1 Chakra to increase the damage by 1d8, up to 40d8 total (not limited by level). The Perform Requirements do not increase.

Mastery: The first, third and fifth steps increase the duration of the vortex by 1 round each, though no chakra coil damage is dealt after the second round.

Note: This technique is extremely powerful and should be denied to player characters.
